response.overview: A minibus running between Szczecin and Berlin forms a moving microcosm of people whose lives unfold between two countries. Through the observation of passengers and their journey, the film reflects on belonging, distance, and the reasons that keep people in between.
response.tagline: A minibus running between Szczecin and Berlin forms a moving microcosm of people whose lives happen in between countries.
response.title: W pomiędzy
